text: Which statement is true concerning the use of dry chemical extinguishers?

options.text: You should direct the spray at the top edges of structural smoke screens
You should direct the spray at the base of the fire
They are deployed safely on metal fires like sodium or magnesium
They provide deep cooling to prevent any risk of re-ignition

explanation: When using dry chemical extinguishers, the spray should always be directed at the base of the fire. This action smothers the fire by interrupting the chemical chain reaction and forming a barrier.
